parameters.content:
## RESUMEIQ — EMAIL ASSISTANT WORKFLOW

Helps HR draft or edit a candidate email by chatting with it — the assistant sees the candidate's full screening report plus the job context, so it can write something grounded in real evidence instead of generic filler. This workflow only ever returns a draft; it never sends anything. Sending is a completely separate workflow (`hr-resume-screening-send-email.json`) that only fires when HR clicks Send in the frontend.

**STATUS: draft + validation only — OpenAI drafting node added next.**
